places.name: Fengjia Night Market
places.address: 華夏巷東四弄, 西屯區, 臺中市, 水湳經貿園區
places.note: Taiwan's largest night market, open from late afternoon until 1am

places.name: National Taiwan Museum of Fine Arts
places.address: 五權西路一段, 西區, 臺中市, 臺灣
places.note: One of Asia's largest fine arts museums, free entry, strong Taiwanese art collection

places.name: Rainbow Village
places.address: 忠勇路, 南屯區, 臺中市, 臺灣
places.note: Tiny village painted floor-to-ceiling in colourful murals by a 90-year-old veteran

places.name: Miyahara
places.address: 中山路, 中區, 臺中市, 臺灣
places.note: Historic ophthalmology clinic turned premium ice cream and dessert parlour with ornate interior

places.name: Gaomei Wetlands
places.address: 臨港路六段, 清水區, 臺中市, 臺灣
places.note: Tidal wetland with a wooden boardwalk walkway, good for sunset and birdwatching

places.name: Calligraphy Greenway
places.address: 西區, 臺中市, 臺灣
places.note: 1.5km linear park through the city centre with public art and a lively cafe strip
